Lizardscale Mantle  
 


Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 5
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Lizardscale Mantle

Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 5
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 6 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:87
Submitted By:Piasa
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 03:31:25
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 105pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 28
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is found on creatures.

The Feerrott
NPC Name
Tae Ew Diviner

Zone Name
The Feerrott


Uploaded September 16th, 2025 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
CT has changed
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 4:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757923919
28 posts
On Thoullex at least CT has become the Accursed Temple of Cazic Thule- a lesser PoH and a very tough place indeed. Even outside the temple is harder, everyone was dk blue or yellow to my 33 Pali. I would imagine this would have some effect on the pricing of items that came out of CT. I don't know if there is somewhere else these items will drop, if someone discovers it pls post it here!
▲ Page top
RE: CT has changed
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 4:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759191872
4 posts
Prices havent changed much. Seems they have done this with all the servers. Now all the stuff that drops inside the temple now drops outside of it. Same lvl of mobs and drop rates for the most part on most items. Just different zone. Little harder on those newbie Ogres to that use the zone to lvl, lol.
▲ Page top
Need help...
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 10:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758592260
15 posts
Got a question...Im a 34 shammy and i have been wanting these for a while now, people are trying ot sell these tome for 200-300pp on the Zebuxoruk server not sure why. I have decided to go kill this guy myself, and i have heard that he can charm you and has a pet as well...if anyone can give me info on if i can kill him. I would appreciate it also im going to use my pet as well and see if that helps. thx!

34th shaman of the tribunal
Zebuxoruk server
▲ Page top
RE: Need help...
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 7:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770667323
39 posts
He will try to charm you for sure, you have to interrupt his casting all the time if you want to have a chance or more than 100 in MR . I went there with my mage who was around 50 at this time, killed him a few times and ive been charmed one or twice.

I ended up killing a 51 druid who was near entrance in a blow , and regained control after -)
I had more than 100 mr and the mob was at least 20 lvl below me ...

At your level, i would not suggest to try him alone, not because he is tough , but just because he will charm you if u cant interrupt casting.
Bring an enc, 1 cler and 1 war by example who can all stun and bash ; if u keep him stunned, you will kill him very quickly .

For the pet, its not really a problem, just park it somewhere with root.


▲ Page top
RE: Need help...
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 11:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749845897
236 posts
what about DoTting, rooting, and getting out of cast range? he can't have many hps if he's a caster... can he?
▲ Page top
RE: Need help...
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2002 at 10:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
He would crush you. (Well, the fact that he is surrounded by friends doesn't help either) Get a group 25+, a single 50+ (dunno bout other classes but a SK can handle it w/o any trouble), or about 3-4 30+ (gotta have war or SK/chanty and cleric would be a BIG help). Oh, and yea, he's a chanty.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 25 2001 at 7:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you can attain this item at lvl 1 and up my lvl 5 druid got it from a high lvl druid who was really nice. now I'm lvl 12 and still use this so you can be lower than lvl 28.
Someone gave this to me =D
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761054006
16 posts
this was given to me while i was putterin around in cb. i wasnt sure if i needed it, but now that i see that all my wis equipment combined gives me +18 (up to 103 as my WE ranger) im glad i got this! thats why i got my savants cap hehe
▲ Page top
pure casters think again
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 5:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759252242
8 posts
FYI - "pure" casters are not just INT casters. Clerics, Druids, and Shamen ARE pure casters... just because they aren't INT casters doesnt mean they are not PURE casters. But no - the INT casters cannot use this item.

Elyena Goldenrose
Human Druid of 35th Season
Zeb. server

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 11 2001 at 5:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wrong, pure casters are nec, mage, wiz, and chanter, period
pure casters think again
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 3:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248715956
21 posts
If you're a pure caster don't bother with these shoulders. They have great stats, but you can't actually use them if you're a necro wizard magician or enchanter.
▲ Page top

no - cleric / shaman / druids are called priests - necro / mage / wiz / chanter are called pure casters.

then again - who cares about symantics of class type naming? lol
